expected: ARO is a DSL where every statement is `Verb [the] <result> preposition [the] <object>.`. Programs are directories of `.aro` files plus an optional `openapi.yaml` (for HTTP). `Application-Start` is the entry point. Variables are immutable. Actions are lazy by default; effects keep source order. Errors are the failing statement rendered as a sentence. Compile to native via `aro build`, interpret via `aro run`, test via `aro test`. Extend with Swift/Rust/C/Python plugins.
